title: Hrashwo Deergha
overview: Hrashwo Deergha is an action-comedy directed by Chandra Pant, starring Neeta Dhungana, Harihar Adhikari, Bipana Thapa, Brahmanandam, Pradeep Singh Rawat, and Mohammad Ali.
